headline: Broadridge to Participate in Upcoming Investor Events
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE:BR) announced that it will be participating at two upcoming investor events. One of these events will include a fireside chat with management, which will be available on Broadridge's Investor Relations page at www.broadridge-ir.com.

headline: 2 Cash-Producing Stocks to Keep an Eye On and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
